  • Technical Audits for AI-Generated Code

    March 10, 2026

    The biggest risk with AI-generated code isn’t that it’s wrong — it’s that it’s almost right. A human reviewing it sees something that looks correct, skims it, and merges. The subtle bug lives on. This is why I run a structured technical audit on every piece of AI-generated code before...

  • Structured Prompting for Multi-Stage Development

    February 05, 2026
